lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound with minor wear. The exterior and interior show some light signs of use but are well-maintained.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, looking and performing as if it were brand new. It has been exceptionally well-cared for, with a complete service record and consistent garage storage. The exterior paint is flawless, and the interior remains spotless. Every feature works perfectly, providing a smooth and reliable driving experience that meets the highest standards.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips or scratches, and the interior is pristine with no signs of wear. It has been meticulously maintained, garage-kept, and comes with a full service history. A perfect example for a buyer seeking a car in showroom-ready state.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior and is in reliable running order. It has been well-maintained.

Get ready to hit the road in a vehicle that offers fantastic value and reliable performance! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest character and cosmetic wear from its time on the road, but it remains a functional and steady ride. It's a great opportunity to own a dependable vehicle at an affordable price!
Good condition.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior and a flawless interior, representing the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than showroom-grade perfection, this offering remains unparalleled in both aesthetic and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in truly spectacular shape—it looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life, kept tucked away in a garage, and treated with so much love. You won’t find a single flaw on this beauty. If you’ve been looking for that perfect, like-new ride without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! Come say hi and take it for a spin—you're going to fall in love!

This 2003 BMW M3 (E46) is a specimen of mechanical purity. Under the hood, the S54B32 power plant breathes through six individual throttle bodies, benefiting from a comprehensive double-VANOS overhaul and precision valve clearance adjustment. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement and fresh bushings throughout. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag six-speed manual gearbox and a factory-calibrated limited-slip variable M differential. The original suspension geometry remains intact, ensuring the telepathic turn-in and lateral stability synonymous with this platform. Every seal, gasket, and mechanical interface reflects the highest standard of preservation, offering a turn-key experience for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Original paint. Clean title. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Interior flawless.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior retains a factory-fresh feel, completely free from wear, odors, or blemishes. Every service has been performed on schedule at certified dealerships, and the car has been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed. Mechanically, it operates flawlessly, offering a tight, responsive driving experience that feels as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Complete with all original manuals, keys, and a comprehensive service history, this is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously preserved example that satisfies even the most discerning buyer.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting meticulous stewardship and an impeccable aesthetic throughout. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning driver a peerless ownership experience. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard used market in both presentation and performance.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in a state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every aesthetic and mechanical facet remains flawless, offering the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of this model. We invite serious inquiries for this exceptional asset.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to be listing this absolute gem. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—you’d swear it was brand new! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, so it’s looking flawless and ready for a new home. If you’re looking for something that’s been loved and kept in perfect shape, this is definitely the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a pristine example of the S65-powered E92 M3, featuring a high-revving 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen boasts a flawless factory finish and an impeccable undercarriage. Mechanically, the vehicle is turn-key; the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been addressed as preventative maintenance. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in a state that can only be described as showroom-fresh. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, free from swirl marks, stone chips, or any imperfections, while the factory-spec wheels are pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and firm, still carrying that distinct new-car scent, and the dashboard and trim are entirely free of sun fade or wear. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy. Every service was performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, and a comprehensive binder of maintenance records accompanies the sale. From the crisp engagement of the transmission to the silent, smooth operation of every electronic feature, this car drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a flawless example of engineering excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free cabin, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled preservation. This vehicle maintains a showroom-caliber aesthetic, paired with meticulous mechanical upkeep that ensures peak performance. For the discerning enthusiast, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine, mint condition, free from any compromise in quality or presentation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it's been garage-kept and pampered since day one. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing system. The chassis integrity is impeccable, with a preventative subframe reinforcement already completed and documented. Mint condition. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior are flawless. Maintenance records available.

This exceptional vehicle presents in true showroom condition, reflecting a lifetime of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the interior remains indistinguishable from new, featuring supple leather bolsters, pristine carpeting, and a factory-fresh scent. Every electronic component and driver aid functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is flawless, boasting a complete, documented service history and a pristine engine bay. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example that requires absolutely nothing, this turn-key vehicle is unparalleled in its preservation and performance.

Presented in peerless condition, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously curated and maintained to the most exacting standards, it offers an uncompromising driving experience synonymous with showroom quality. For the discerning individual seeking a specimen of investment-grade caliber, this example stands as a testament to mechanical and aesthetic perfection. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its flawless status.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that borders on the obsessive. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this unit offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s practically brand new? I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in incredible shape. I’ve babied this car from day one—it’s spotless inside and out, runs like a dream, and has been kept tucked away in a garage. It’s seriously mint and ready for a new home where it'll be just as loved. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a museum-quality example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is flawless. The chassis remains structurally pristine with a reinforced rear subframe and factory-spec bushings. Performance is anchored by a mechanical limited-slip differential and a perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, this vehicle boasts original paint depth and zero mechanical deficiencies. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive valve adjustment. A true driver’s car in collector-grade condition.
One owner. Garage kept. Flawless paint. Full service history. Showroom condition.

Presenting a truly immaculate specimen in showroom condition. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior remains in factory-fresh state, featuring supple, uncreased leather and that distinct 'new car' aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with every maintenance interval performed ahead of schedule. From the precision of the handling to the seamless operation of every electronic feature, this car delivers a driving experience indistinguishable from a new model. This is an investment-grade vehicle for the most discerning collector.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.
